Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: To become suddenly brave or emotionally hardened in a difficult situation.
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent (Plain Rephrasi: جرأت مند بیت یا دلیر بیت
Usage Contexts: Daily speech, tribal honor discussions, political rhetoric
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Reflects pastoral imagery of wolves in Brahui tribal regions symbolizing courage and survival.

Second Example Sentence: تو هم دل ءَ گرگ بیت اگر حق ءَ دفاع کنگے۔
Third Example Sentence: سختی ءَ روزگار انسان دل ءَ گرگ بیت۔
